3256580.name: Royal Romances: Fortunes and Foes Collector's Edition Demo
3256580.description: What does the future hold? The reign of cruel King Illeon has come to an end. Love triumphed over evil, and peaceful times have returned to the land. But there are new adventures ahead for our heroes. In the depths of the Enchanted Forest, you encounter a dragon. Fear not, it's only a hatchling! What do you do with it? Of course, you cannot tell a single living soul about your lucky find. Especially when a traveling circus has stopped on its way to a performance at the royal palace, attracting the attention of a thousand eyes. Or maybe just enjoy the show!
3256580.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
